headline: Leidos Expands Critical Infrastructure And Defense Cloud Role With ENTRUST Deal
summary: Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) has closed its acquisition of ENTRUST Solutions Group, expanding its energy infrastructure and utility services business. The ENTRUST deal is described as a key part of the company’s NorthStar 2030 strategy and increases its presence in grid modernization work. Leidos has also secured a U.S. Air Force contract to modernize the Cloud One platform alongside leading cloud providers. For investors, these moves connect two core areas of Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS):...

headline: How The Investment Story For Leidos (LDOS) Is Shifting After Mixed Q4 And Guidance Updates
summary: The fair value estimate on Leidos Holdings has been trimmed from US$212.46 to US$209.07, a reduction of about 1.6%. That modest cut lines up with mixed analyst commentary, where enthusiasm around growth markets and defense technology runs alongside concern about Q4 outcomes, contract specific risks, and earnings quality. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifts in expectations and what to watch as the story around Leidos continues to evolve. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...
